# Events ledger

Cross-book events. Each event is written once here and rendered from each POV
in the books that touch it.

<!-- Format, per REWRITE-PLAN.md §8:

## E-001: <short title>
- date: YYYY-MM-DD
- location: <where>
- present: [<name>, <name>, ...]
- canonical: <the ground truth of what happened, independent of POV>
- rendered_in:
    <book>/ch_NN: <POV>, <one-line summary of what this POV sees>
- book_constraints: <per-book knowledge limits, if any>
-->
